case_title: ENGRAM, GWENIFER R.(GUARDIAN AD LITEM) et al VS SIMMSONS, ANNE MRS. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ENGRAM, GWENIFER R.(GUARDIAN AD LITEM) ENGRAM, CHRISTINA M.(MINOR) DAVENPORT, ALBERT C. AS TO DEFENDANT SIMMSONS, ANNE MRS. CSAA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-13-2002, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO SEP-23-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 REQUIRED TO BE AT WORK ON SEPT.13, A PUBLIC HEALTH PHYSICIAN. ICOVER URGENT CARE & DROP-INS THAT DAY NO SUBSTITUTE AVAILABLE.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SIMMSONS, ANNE MRS.
PETITION FOR MINOR BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENGRAM, GWENIFER R.(GUARDIAN AD LITEM) ENGRAM, CHRISTINA M.(MINOR) DAVENPORT, ALBERT C. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SIMMSONS, ANNE MRS. CSAA CSAA IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
